name: Don't take me away
short_description: This is a tower defense building game. The game controls the movement of the protagonist through the arrow keys on the keyboard or the left mouse button, and interacts with characters and objects in the scene through the space bar.
detailed_description:
This is a tower defense game. You are a member of the resistance organization, and by building defense facilities in the open space, coupled with a reasonable economic system, you ultimately defeat the police officers who come to pursue you.
1. Function:
The game controls the protagonist's movement through the directional keys on the keyboard, builds buildings with the mouse, and interacts with characters and objects in the scene through the space bar.
2. Content:
We have now joined 16 bosses, find their weaknesses and defeat them!
3. Features:
Gorgeous boss skills, various imaginative buildings for you to match
